programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword. Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Airachnid and Starscream ally for a weapon Starscream offers to join Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead holds synthetic Energon formula Decepticons close in.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Earth's most accomplished game hunter has his sights set on a new target: the head of Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Astrotrain and Blitzwing battle each other for Decepticon leadership.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hoist accidentally lands himself a role in a big Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Elite Guard plans to take Prime and crew back to Cybertron, unaware of Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: AllSpark energy turns junk into a sentient robot, who ends up causing more harm than good.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee gets caught in an underground street racing circuit, attracting Decepticon attention.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead befriends two AllSpark-powered construction vehicles, but Decepticons target them.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poltersmurf: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy And The Porridge Pot: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sorcerer Smurf: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Soothsayer Smurfette: When Smurfette meets this gentle old gypsy woman in the forest and receives a swirling multicoloured dress, she's delighted. How could she know that this woman is really the evil wizard Gargamel in disguise, and that there is a terrible spell on the beautiful dress?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Lost City Of Yore: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: S2 Robo‑Bwahs
programme.desc: Robots rise, circuits spark and Rabbids battle their mechanical doubles.

programme.title: S3 Quest Mode Bwah
programme.desc: Epic missions and wild challenges push Rabbids into full quest mode.

programme.title: Critter Chaos & Creature Capers
programme.desc: Creatures big and small spark wild Rabbid antics in a lively mix of pets, farm life and animal mayhem.

programme.title: Blooming Bwahs & Outdoor Antics
programme.desc: Nature blooms and chaos follows as Rabbids meet animals, chase sunshine and leap into fresh spring adventures.

programme.title: S1 Critter Chaos
programme.desc: Animals, fleas and farmyard madness spark wild Rabbid antics.

programme.title: S2 Creature Bwah‑niverse
programme.desc: Feathers, claws and critter chaos as Rabbids meet wild new friends.

programme.title: S1 Bwah‑Beats
programme.desc: Music, noise and DJ disasters collide in a rhythm‑fuelled Rabbid mess.

programme.title: The Very Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Masha loves fairy tales and of course she believes that each fairy tale should lead to happy end, even if nothing contributes to it! That's how the story goes… The Bear still hopes to win the heart of the female Bear. He finds an ancient gondola at the bottom of the forest lake. The Bear decides to restore it and invites the female Bear for a romantic ride! No one would have expected that this story would perfectly match Masha's new hobby - puppet theatre.

programme.title: Time To Ride My Pony
programme.desc: The Bear's good friend, the Tiger, is back for a visit and they decide to spend the time together in an intellectual way – playing chess. Masha is immediately drawn into the game and to everyone's surprise, she outsmarts and outplays both the Bear and his friend with just one chess figure.

programme.title: The Grand Piano Lesson
programme.desc: The bear finds a beautiful black piano in the forest. He happily takes it home, fixes and tunes it and begins to play some music. Masha couldn't help staying away from this lovely instrument. She decides to become a world famous pianist, she asks the Bear to teach her how to play the piano.

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: The Foundling
programme.desc: Occasionally Masha finds an egg, from which a penguin hatches. The Bear has to take double care now. He cooks special dishes and builds mini aqua park for little penguin and Masha. Finally the Bear figures out that the penguin will be happy only in suitable weather conditions and send the penguin Antarctica on a little plane.

programme.title: See You Later
programme.desc: This day will change Bear's life forever. To everyone's surprise, Masha has suddenly grown up, getting all the forest dwellers shocked by her exceptionally good behavior. Her sister Dasha is going to take her back to the big city, which really upsets the Bear and others.

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: Scary Story About Spooky Stories
programme.desc: Are you sure that you really like spooky stories? What if this kind of story will get you really thrilled? Listen to one classic story and don't say that you are not shocked after all!

programme.title: Soul Freezing Tale Of Grim Forest And Tiny Timid Bug
programme.desc: All children are afraid of the dark. Masha was afraid of it too and had to sit with a torch all night long! But once upon a time she came up with the tale about a tiny bug, which lived in the woods and was so afraid of the dark, that every rustle made its heart tremble! The bug suffered a lot until he realized that all tiny things you see in the dark just seem to be frightful and fear makes no sense at all!

programme.title: Terrible Truth About Those Who Are Afraid To Be Little
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Gloomy Story About The Darkest Dreams
programme.desc: All children are keen on computer games! Everyone likes to shoot a couple of monsters before going to sleep. Tolik also liked to play shooters until the monsters attack him in reality in order to commit the revenge! Or…was it just a dream? Let's see...

programme.title: Sinister Saga Of A Sick Tummy And A Girl Who Was Afraid Of Doctors
programme.desc: Masha narrates a terrific story about one little girl who was afraid of doctors. And once upon a time she experienced one fantastic story…she decided to cook dinner for her dolls. She took some clay and made “meat balls” with “semolina porridge”. As the meal seemed tasty, Sima decided to eat a bit of her dinner too… And so she lies in her bad and feels a horrible stomachache. Nobody knows how long she would need to suffer, but when she woke up…she realized herself in hospital…near the real snow queen… who explained that medical treatment is not scary at all…though some other things are very fearsome! Oh yeah!

programme.title: Bloodcurdling Saga About Joyful Event
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Grim Parable About Superstitious Girl
programme.desc: Some people happen to believe in all sorts of omens like black cats, wearing clothes inside out, prophetic dreams… Poor girl Lucy believed in that kind of stuff so much that was even afraid to go outside to play with her friends. And how could you go out if you were born in the year of Purple rabbit that promises…no matter what… You'll see…

programme.title: Terrifying True Story About Monsters And Those Who Fear Them
programme.desc: Are you afraid of monsters? Sure you are! Let me tell you a scary story about a boy who experienced a real fear…This story happened on an abandoned tractor factory. The boy lost a scoop from his toy-tractor and decided to look for it at the factory. So he goes up the stairs and sees a large female monster, who was about to paint her lips with a roller! As he kept walking he noticed more monsters playing domino! The boy was very terrified and about to cry, when he learnt that it was just a movie set and all the monsters were not real! They were just actors…Finally the boy realized that all the monsters from the books and movies are not real at all! But if want to see a real monster- watch a fly under a microscope!

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: The Bear has a plan to save the sweltering She-Bear> He's planned a date and made refreshing homemade lemonade from his own grown lemons. But as usual, Masha bursts into the plan. Treat the whole forest with lemonade - that's the best idea! Quiet date - that's not great! Hello lemonade fever!

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Grim Testament About One Snotty Boy
programme.desc: Have you ever heard that the world around is full terrible plagues and diseases? One boy called Semushka knows it for sure! Wherever he threw a glance – he seemed to see tetanus, rubella and other kinds of chickenpoxes…The poor boy was so terrified that began to squish his nose even harder. The only saving measures was an aid kit which his grandmother has put in his backpack “just in case” and a little spacesuit…Basically…this grim “testament” about such a snotty boy came out to be the most educative one!

programme.title: A Myth Full Of Grief And Despair About One Historical Error
programme.desc: Here is a boy called Arkasha who really doesn't like history lessons. The most frightening thing for him was…a history test. He tried his best to prepare for the test, however he fell asleep. When he opened his eyes he saw all the range of historic characters chastising him for his illiteracy, and Napoleon was even ready to hit him on the head with a globe! Arkasha was so scared that vowed to learn all the names and dates, otherwise how could he protect himself from such nervous historic creatures?!Do you know what children are scared the most of at school? What makes them tremble?!

programme.title: Panic Unbearable Legend About Insects
programme.desc: Once there was a girl called Anya who was very scared of insects! One day Anya's mother asked her to help around the house but in everything she did, Anya was haunted by spiders and all kinds of midges! She was on the edge of despair when her little brother proved to her, that little crumbs can't be of any danger to giants like children!

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Bon Appétit
programme.desc: Panda- the Bear's distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dump-lings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking. And a simple cooking turns into a culinary master class with butterflies!

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Prances With Wolves
programme.desc: The Wolves that live in the forest come with a plan to kidnap Masha and demand the Bear to pay a ransom. However the Bear is pleased to find Masha gone and he does not rush the events. Meanwhile Masha turns the Wolves' lives into a hell and they end up paying the ransom to the Bear just to get rid of her once and for all.

programme.title: Dennis the Menance and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis the Menance and Gnasher - Dennis the Menance and Gnasher S1 EP135: Dennis the Menace gets up to extreme fun and mischief with his friends, Pieface and Curly.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Close Encounter of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic loses his memory when Robotnik uses a hypnotic flower pollen on him, and tells him he's just an "ordinary" guy.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.desc: Donkey Kong and Candy train to compete in a dance contest against King K. Rool and Krusha. Because Donkey Kong can't dance, he wants some help from Funky.

programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are on a cruise when the Egg Fort appears inside a glacier. As Sonic faces his foes, he receives some help from Knuckles.

programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City. There he is confronted by some local thugs Li Yan and the Bruiser Boys.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Jungle Jump
programme.desc: Welcome to the jungle and the 6th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers take on cranky crabs and hungry sharks as they make their way through this tropical obstacle course.

programme.title: SONIC X The Dam Scam
programme.desc: When Sonic, Tails, Chris and the Egg Fort crash land on the Nature Continent after a fight, Tails and Chris protest against a dam while Sonic is caught in a battle against Decoe, Bocoe, E-65 and Eggman

programme.desc: Donkey Kong saves Bluster's life, causing him to think he owes Donkey Kong a favor. He tries to protect Donkey Kong from everything, while Diddy and Funky try to stop him from doing it.

programme.title: SONIC X Sonic's Scream Test
programme.desc: Chris' mother Lindsey is shooting a movie in an old castle and Sonic and his friends are there to visit as well. However, they begin to notice that something is amiss as ghostly figures begin to appear.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Rainbow Rumble
programme.desc: The top two gamers meet head-to-head in the final challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players race to the finish line to be crowned the ultimate gamer!

programme.desc: Host Frankie view gets to know the Kidaverse Roblox Rumble gamers. Get to know their awesome personalities and strategies for the competition.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Orangutango
programme.desc: Donkey Kong and Candy train to compete in a dance contest against King K. Rool and Krusha. Because Donkey Kong can't dance, he wants some help from Funky.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes help a young girl care for the Mareep at her family's farm.

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Ash finds a wild Cyndaquil, he's eager to catch it—but he's not alone.

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Plus One
programme.desc: Longtime single friends Alice & Ben agree to be one another's plus ones as they power through an endless parade of hilarious and insufferable weddings

programme.title: Electric Jesus
programme.desc: When a promoter sells a Christian metal band on the promise of a summer tour in 1986, their desire to "make Jesus famous" meets the complexities and confusion of personal ambition, youthful zeal, lifelong friendships, and first love.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back In Business
programme.desc: The buzz is back in Barbershop 2. Calvin is struggling to keep his father's shop alive, this time against urban developers looking to replace "mom & pop" establishments with name-brand chains. The world changes, but some things never go out of style...

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister Chelsea is entered into a local bike race by her friend, she is embarrassed about not being able to ride without training wheels. Inspired by Barbie's stories, Chelsea finds herself transported to the magical world of Dreamtopia, where her imagination runs wild.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: The Little Vampire
programme.desc: From the screenwriters of Chicken Run and The Addams Family, comes The Little Vampire: a fantastic adventure that you can really sink your teeth into!

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: Chipwrecked
programme.desc: The vacationing Chipmunks and Chipettes are turning a luxury cruise liner into their personal playground, until they become "chipwrecked" on a remote island.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: Cut Bank

programme.title: Winter Ridge
programme.desc: A young detective is torn apart after his wife ends up in a coma. Unable to accept her condition, he throws himself into a manhunt chasing a serial killer whose motives are connected to his wife.

programme.title: Loving Vincent
programme.desc: Vincent Willem van Gogh is undoubtedly one of the most famous and influential figures in the history of Western art. Yet during his lifetime Vincent struggled with poverty and depression, dying at only 37 years old.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: They Call Me Trinity
programme.desc: A lazy, unorthodox gunfighter and his portly, horse-thieving brother defend a Mormon settlement from a land-grabbing Major, a Mexican bandit, and their henchmen.

programme.title: Bernie the Dolphin
programme.desc: A heart-warming, wholesome family adventure about a brother and sister who befriend badly sunburned dolphin Bernie, who has recently been separated from his family. When Bernie goes missing and the kids go looking for him, they discover a real-estate development plan that threatens the baby sea turtles on their favourite beach. Can the brave duo stop the developers while racing to reunite Bernie with his loved ones?

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows. When Paul, who can't stand his sister's spoiled pet, abandons Marnie at a rural petrol station she comes across a loyal band of drifters who join forces to capture a notorious, local gang of petty thieves. A pur-fectly hilarious tail of friendship, secret-missions and side-splitting cat-itude! A.k.a. Marnie's World

programme.title: Luna: Spirit of the Whale
programme.desc: When a single Orca is seen near Vancouver Island, it's clear it got separated from its pod and is in the wrong spot. Ted Jeffries and his team at the Department of Fisheries & Oceans (DFO) want to catch Luna and bring him back to his family. But, the local folks think it should be up to Luna to decide where to stay.

programme.title: The Client
programme.desc: The Mafia wants to keep 11-year-old Mark Sway quiet, and a federal prosecutor wants to learn exactly what he knows. So Mark finds a lawyer who's smart and tough, and she wants to help him. If he can only trust her…

programme.title: Cold Souls: Cold Souls
programme.desc: Paul is an actor who feels bogged down by his participation in a production of Chekov's play, Vanya.

programme.title: Memoirs Of An Invisible Man
programme.desc: When a government experiment goes awry it renders an innocent bystander invisible.

programme.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space
programme.desc: One-of-a-kind alien invasion sci-fi featuring blood drinking alien clowns harvesting a small city.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
programme.desc: Michael Bryce continues his friendship with assassin, Darius Kincaid, as they try to save Darius' wife Sonia.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: A father goes undercover and infiltrates a Mexican drug cartel for the DEA in order to free his son.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: A mommy vlogger seeks to uncover the truth behind her best friend Emily's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Flypaper
programme.desc: During a bank robbery, a man decides to protect the pretty teller who he has fallen head over heels for.

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: In The Butterfly Effect Evan Treborn (Ashton Kutcher) has lost crucial moments of his life, his childhood scarred by a series of terrifying events he can't remember. When Evan realises that by reading his diaries he can unlock the past and go back in time, he tries to reclaim the missing memories by tampering with the past... with unexpected and disastrous results! The more Evan tampers with time, the more his life - and that of his friend Kayleigh (Amy Smart) - begin to unravel, and he discovers there is no such thing as a happy ending!

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: A nightmare befalls a group of friends on the Appalachian trail in this iconic franchise reboot from the original creator Alan. B. McElroy. While on a dream trip, a group finds themselves at the mercy of an urban legend - The Foundation. As a freak accident drives the group deeper into the mountains, they find themselves succumbing one by one in a gruesome game of survival.

programme.title: Music
programme.desc: Golden Globe award nominee Music is the directorial debut from multi-Grammy Award nominee and global superstar Sia. Starring Academy Award nominee Kate Hudson, Tony and Grammy Award winner Leslie Odom Jr. and Sia-protégé Maddie Ziegler and Juliette Lewis. While on a journey of discovery, a newly sober woman becomes the sole guardian of her half-sister, Music, a young girl on the autism spectrum.

programme.title: Mythica: The Necromancer
programme.desc: A non-stop action fantasy that will transport you into a world of sorcerers, trolls and witches. When her most loyal friend is taken hostage by the cruel master of the Thieves Guild, Marek embarks on a corrupt mission. But when the mission leads into the clutches of Szorlok - their greatest enemy - Marek must sacrifice her ambitions and perhaps her own soul to save her friends.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Inspired by true historical events, this epic action thriller stars martial arts legend Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Adrian Brody. When corrupt Roman leader Tiberius arrives with a giant army to claim the Silk Road, Huo An (Chan), teams up his army with an mysterious elite Legion, led by General Lucius (Cusack), to protect his country. A tale of courage, friendship and honour.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: Unlucky in love Abbey opens her heart in a letter and puts it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out. Starring Bethany Joy Lenz (2019)

programme.title: A Lifelong Love
programme.desc: (2023) Lyrical love story starring Andrea Brooks and Patch May. When poet Annika tries to reunite her grandfather with his first love, will teaming up with an old flame rekindle another romance?

programme.title: The Happiness Playbook
programme.desc: (2022) Romcom with Kabby Borders and Tyler Harlow. A journalist goes undercover to expose the truth about a mysterious retreat. But when sparks fly with its owner, will love be the front-page story?

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Vanessa Sears. When mysterious love letters appear in her mailbox, a woman embarks on a heartfelt quest -finding love where she least expects it.

programme.title: Love on the Vines
programme.desc: (2017) A charming, full-bodied romantic comedy with Margo Harshman. When a lawyer is forced to spend six weeks on a vineyard in order to inherit it, unexpected romance becomes the sweetest vintage.

programme.title: Save the Date
programme.desc: Lizzy Caplan and Alison Brie star in a romantic comedy about 2 very different sisters, and their adventures in love, lust and a race to the altar.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman
programme.desc: An upbeat and acerbic romantic comedy featuring stellar cast: Michelle Pfeiffer, Paul Rudd, Saoirse Ronan, Jon Lovitz, Stacey Dash, Fred Willard, Sarah Alexander, Tracey Ullman, Henry Winkler.

programme.title: Made for You, with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Despite the Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: Manhattan
programme.desc: Woody Allen, Diane Keaton, Meryl Streep and Mariel Hemingway star in Woody Allen's extraordinary and funny film that explores the embattled life and loves of a successful New York comedy writer.

programme.title: Aloha
programme.desc: A celebrated military contractor returns to the site of his greatest career triumphs and re-connects with a long-ago love while unexpectedly falling for the hard-charging Air Force watchdog assigned to him.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: In her Academy Award winning role, Cher, while waiting for her timid fiance to decide between her and his mother, falls in love with her fiance's estranged brother, a bakery worker with a love of opera and life.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Nicole, a successful travel blogger, meets Kade, a marketing rep for a travel publishing company, and they form the beginnings of a relationship while exploring an island destination. They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

programme.title: It's a Fixer Upper
programme.desc: When The Dovers find they're in financial jeopardy, the only answer is to sell the house Anne's parent's left her. But when no one wants to buy it, they decide the only way to get rid of the house is to fix it up.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: All Aboard For Love
programme.desc: As Alison prepares for new ocean adventures, business executive Joel navigates his way into her heart and they become co-captains for life.

programme.title: Vanished: Searching for My Sister
programme.desc: Kayla asks twin sister Jada to watch her daughter, and then disappears.

programme.title: Tempting Fate
programme.desc: Gabby's marriage is jeopardized when she meets Matt.

programme.title: The College Admissions Scandal
programme.desc: Two wealthy mothers obsess over getting their teens into top colleges.

programme.title: Shattered Families
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime.

programme.title: Judicial Indiscretion
programme.desc: Monica Barrett learns she is on the President's shortlist.

programme.title: Game of Love
programme.desc: Ex-Wife Frances conspires with her grown children to force Jake to sell his cherished Seattle basketball team. Will game changing moves off the court help reignite romantic sparks?

programme.title: Undercover Angel
programme.desc: When a little girl prays for a miracle to help her recently divorced mother settle in their new town and fixer-upper house, an angel posing as a handyman, is sent down from heaven to help. While trying to accomplish his mission, the angel falls for the mother, ultimately forcing him into the unlikeliest of choices.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Widowed doctor Jessica vacations in Fiji with her daughter and finds love with resort owner Will.

programme.title: The Love Club: Lauren
programme.desc: Lauren faces divorce papers but has a feeling that it's not quite over, so she asks the Love Club for help.

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Nicole Kidman and wickedly funny Will Ferrell star as actors playing Darrin and Samantha on a remake of the television show "Bewitched" in this cleverly crafty comedy from director NoraEphron.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: Based on the beloved bestselling novel, A Dog's Way Home chronicles the heartwarming adventure of Bella (voiced by Bryce Dallas Howard), a devoted dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: Crazy Westerners
programme.desc: Little Rita is a female gunslinger who travels to the Far West chasing outlaws. She takes gold from them and hides it in a cave which she plans to blow up one day and get rid of the root of all evil: money.

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: A gang working for The Shadow is terrorizing the town. John Travers decides to take on the job of sheriff and do something about it.

programme.title: Adiós Gringo
programme.desc: A gunslinger on the run for a murder he didn't commit goes to New Mexico where he hopes to find a person who can exculpate him. While on his way he finds a girl who has been kidnapped and tortured, sets her free and then takes his revenge at gunpoint.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: In Tulsa, after a rancher dies during a feud with a major oil company, his daughter, driven by revenge, starts digging for oil herself.

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: In 1854, Jeb Stuart, George Custer and other graduates from West Point are posted to Kansas to help pacify the territory before railroad construction to Santa Fe can resume.

programme.title: THE SECRET PLACE
programme.desc: When a temperamental opera star finds out her husband is accused of murder she sets off to find the real killer and is determined to prove her husbands innocence. As she comes closer to the truth, she also comes closer to danger.

programme.title: Nowhere To Go
programme.desc: In London, a Canadian serving prison time for grand theft escapes prison and attempts to retrieve his loot, kept in a bank safety deposit box, but his accomplice takes the security key while he only has the pass code.

programme.title: Pink String and Sealing Wax
programme.desc: In 1890's Brighton, the young son of a puritanical chemist longs to escape the repressive environment of his family life and the overbearing restraints of his cruel, pious father. Eventually finding refuge in a local tavern, he is immediately attracted to the sordid glamour of the drinking classes and the gritty world that they inhabit. He also finds himself becoming infatuated with the tavern's landlady, which will inadvertently lead to him being drawn into a plot to kill her abusive husband. Directed by Robert Hamer (Kind Hearts and Coronets, School For Scoundrels), Pink String and Sealing Wax stars Googie Withers (The Lady Vanishes), Mervyn Johns (Dead of Night) and Gordon Jackson (Whisky Galore! / The Quatermass Experiment) in a film that cleverly entwines the dynamics of a thriller with biting social commentary and a multi-layered plot structure that contrasts the parallels of the British class system.

programme.title: Simon and Laura
programme.desc: A TV studio hits upon an idea for a new programme - an hour-long show five days a week showing the trials and tribulations of the life of a married couple.

programme.title: Springtime (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A trumpet sound that will echo through your heart.

programme.title: The Goblin
programme.desc: Young-min, in order to get money for his sick daughter's surgery, carries out a hit against his gang member Heo-gang. But when his boss Bae-san refuses to pay him for the hit, Young-min murders his boss. Soon, the police try to arrest him, but Doo-hyun, aka the legendary goblin, takes the blame instead. Released after 10 years, Doo-hyun seeks out the detective who ruined his life, and hears that Young-min has taken his place as the goblin…

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: Little Brother
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: Jazzy Misfits
programme.desc: Sun-deok is visited by her mother abruptly. And She finds her younger sister had vanished with their savings.

programme.title: Very Ordinary Couple
programme.desc: Former couple goes tit for tat after a bitter break up going into a deeper spiral of love and hate.

programme.title: Moonlit Winter
programme.desc: Sae-bom finds a mysterious love letter sent to her mom Yun-hee. This letter makes her wonder about Yun-hee.

programme.title: My Mother, The Mermaid
programme.desc: Na-young who arrives at her parents' hometown to find her father is shocked to meet her 20-year old mother.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As the human population nears extinction, vampires must capture and farm every remaining human, or find a blood substitute before time runs out. However, a covert group of vampires makes a remarkable discovery, one which has the power to save the human race.

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries
programme.desc: (2014) Cosy mystery drama with Eric Mabius. The postal detectives receive special approval to intervene when a man receives devastating news that could lead him to drastic actions.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: When a group of cold-blooded criminals led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn) and Jonah (Cam Gigandet), invade the Miller mansion in a vicious home invasion, Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) must battle his personal demons before saving his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: FAIR GAME is a riveting action-thriller based on the autobiography of real-life undercover CIA operative VALERIE PLAME (Naomi Watts), whose career was destroyed and marriage strained to its limits when her covert identity was exposed by a politically motivated press leak.

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: John Skillpa, a quiet bank clerk living in tiny Peacock, Nebraska, prefers to live an invisible life. This might have to do with John's secret: he has another personality no one knows about, a woman who each morning cooks him breakfast before he starts his day. Then, in a moment, everything changes.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.
